ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "well_model" INTEGER /* ID of the well model */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the well was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the well (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator managing the well */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well type */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status */,
  "well_depth" REAL /* Total depth of the well */,
  "well_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_well_model FOREIGN KEY ("well_model") REFERENCES well_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES well_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES well_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the operator belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the operator started managing the well */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the operator's management ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Drawdown value */,
  "conidx" INTEGER /* Connection index */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the well */,
  "conjpos" INTEGER /* Conjoint position */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the operation */,
  "conbpres" REAL /* Bottom pressure */,
  "conkpos" INTEGER /* Connection K position */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the well */,
  "sgas" REAL /* Gas saturation */,
  "swat" REAL /* Water saturation */,
  "coni_pos" INTEGER /* Conjoint initial position */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation */,
  "operation_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the operation */,
  "operation_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the operation */,
  "operation_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the operation */,
  "operation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the operation in minutes */,
  "operator_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_operations_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the well model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was manufactured */,
  "model_lifespan" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the model in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the well type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well type */,
  "type_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the well type */,
  "type_lifespan" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the well type in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_lifespan" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the sensor in years */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well operation */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor */,
  "sensor_reading_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES well_sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES well_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well operation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES well_operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
